name: Starwulf
short_description: Dive into Starwulf's unique blend of brick puzzles and space shooter action. Explore diverse planets and star systems, unlock special missions, and upgrade your ship. Can you save your home planet? Casual subgames, included to the demo version, offer endless fun.
detailed_description:
Embark on a unique adventure in Starwulf, where classic brick puzzle mechanics meet intense space shooter action. This innovative blend offers a fresh experience for puzzle enthusiasts and space shooter fans alike.

Delve into procedurally generated brick planets and explore randomly selected star systems, ensuring each gameplay session is a unique challenge.

As your experience grows, unlock special stages launched as missions, offering new gameplay events ranging from asteroid fields to enemy fleet attacks. Upgrade your ship to be prepared for more hostile planets.

The main game follows story line where the fate of players home planet hangs in the balance. Can you be the underdog who strikes back?

It is also possible to play casually with subgames consisting of main stages of the game.
